## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests, Ruff and mypy pass when affected.
- [ ] Frontend tests, lint and build pass when affected.
- [ ] Windows PTY/dictation smoke test completed when affected.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for a user-visible change.
- [ ] No secrets, models, logs or generated release artifacts are included.
- [ ] Linux/macOS behavior is not presented as stable without real-device evidence.
